                            125

                            Who abrogated 1962 constitution and became CMLA?

                            Correct Answer: Yahiya Khan
                            Show explanation
                            Explanation
                            General Agha Muhammad Yahya Khan abrogated the 1962 Constitution of Pakistan 

                            And became the Chief Martial Law Administrator (CMLA) on March 25, 1969.

                            Additional information about the 1962 constitutions
                            • The presidential system of government was introduced 
                            • Urdu and Bengali were the official languages declared
                            • Ayoub Khan enforced the new constitution on 8th June 1962
                            • Iskandar Ali Mirza, the first president of Pakistan

                            Last updated 07-02-2026

                            126

                            Pakistan has launched military operation named ‘Operation Bunyan Um Marsoos’ against which country?

                            Correct Answer: India
                            Show explanation
                            Explanation
                            • Operation Bunyan Um Marsoos was launched by Pakistan on 10 May 2025, after Fajr prayer.
                            • It targeted seven key Indian military sites, including Pathankot, Udhampur, Gujarat air bases, Rajasthan air base, and BrahMos storage site.
                            • The operation was retaliation for Indian missile strikes inside Pakistan.
                            • The name Bunyan Um Marsoos comes from Surah Al-Saff (61:4), meaning “a structure firmly joined together.”
                            • Verse reference: “Allah indeed loves those who fight in His Way as though they are a solid wall cemented with molten lead.”


                            Last verified on 07-02-2026

                            127

                            The legal framework order (LFO) 2002 was issued by _____?

                            Correct Answer: Pervaiz Musharraf
                            Show explanation
                            Explanation

                            The Legal Framework Order (LFO) was issued by two different individuals in Pakistan's history:

                            • 1. General Yahya Khan in 1970.
                            • 2. General Pervez Musharraf in 2002.

                            The first LFO was used to establish the legal framework for the 1970 general elections.

                            The second LFO, issued by Musharraf, made constitutional amendments and extended his presidential term.

                            Last verified on 07-02-2026

                            128

                            Who dissolved the assembly and imposed the First Martial Law in Pakistan?

                            Correct Answer: Iskandar Mirza
                            Show explanation
                            Explanation

                            President Iskander Mirza dissolved the assembly and imposed the first martial law in Pakistan on October 7, 1958


                            List of Martial Laws Held in Pakistan from 1947 to 2022

                            Sr#

                             Martial Law Number

                            Date of Martial Law

                            Martial Law Implemented by

                            1

                            First Martial Law

                            7th October 1958

                            Iskandar Mirza

                            2

                            2nd Martial Law

                            25th March 1969

                            General Yahya Khan

                            3

                            3rd Martial Law

                            25th July 1977

                            General Zia ul Haq

                            4

                            4th Martial Law

                            12th October 1999

                            General Pervaiz Musharraf

                             

                            There are total four martial laws Implemented in Pakistan from 1947 to 2023

                            129

                            In which year West Pakistan become One Unit?

                            Correct Answer: 1955
                            Show explanation
                            Explanation

                            The One Unit was the reorganization of the provinces of Pakistan 


                            Prime Minister Muhammad Ali Bogra led it on 22 November 1954


                            Passed on 30 September 1955


                            This program merged the four provinces of West Pakistan into a single province to parallel the province of East Pakistan

                            • West Punjab
                            • Sind
                            • NWFP
                            • Baluchistan

                            Additional information:

                            The One Unit scheme was dissolved on July 1, 1970

                            General Yahya Khan imposed Legal Framework Order No. 1970 to end the program

                            and reinstate the provisional status of the Four Provinces as of August 1947.

                            130

                            How many volumes are there in Mirza Ghalib's Diwan?

                            Correct Answer: 5
                            Show explanation
                            Explanation

                            Mirza Ghalib's Diwan consists of 5 volumes.


                            These volumes compile his ghazals and other poetic works.


                            This showcasing his contributions to Urdu literature.

                            131

                            Which pact was signed between Pakistan and India after war of 1965?

                            Correct Answer: Tashkent Pact
                            Show explanation
                            Explanation
                            The Tashkent Declaration was signed between India and Pakistan 

                            It was signed on 10 January 1966 to resolve the Indo-Pakistani War of 1965

                            It was a peace agreement 

                            Through the mediation of the Soviet Union 

                            It was signed by:
                            • President of Pakistan Ayub Khan 
                            • by India’s Prime Minister Lal Bahadur Shastri

                            It is four of the most popular romances.

                            133

                            The first census in Pakistan was held in?

                            Correct Answer: 1951
                            Show explanation
                            Explanation

                            The first census in Pakistan was held in 1951.


                            Additional information:

                            Total nationwide censuses in Pakistan: 7

                            • 1st Census: 1951
                            • 2nd Census: 1961
                            • 3rd Census: 1972
                            • 4th Census: 1981
                            • 5th Census: 1998
                            • 6th Census: 2017
                            • 7th Census: 2023

                            Frequency: Every 10 years (approx.)

                            Historical start: 1872 (British rule, first census in the region)

                            He was previously serving as vice chancellor of Quaid-e-Azam University.

                            135

                            Afforestation means ______?

                            Correct Answer: To convert land into forest
                            Show explanation
                            Explanation
                            • Afforestation is the process of planting trees on land that was not previously forested.
                              • Helps increase green cover and reduce soil erosion.
                              • Important for climate change mitigation and biodiversity.
                              • Commonly done in degraded, barren, or desert areas.
                              • Supports environmental sustainability and carbon sequestration.

                              Last verified on 06-02-2026

                              136

                              Older the rice ______?

                              Correct Answer: Cheaper in price
                              Show explanation
                              Explanation
                              • Older rice refers to rice that has been stored for some time after harvest.
                              • Its moisture content decreases, making it less sticky when cooked.
                              • Often considered less fresh, so it is cheaper in price.
                              • Popular for certain dishes like biryani due to better separation of grains.
                              • Storage can improve aroma and cooking quality in some varieties.

                              Last verified on 06-02-2026

                              137

                              Correct Answer: Karachi
                              Show explanation
                              Explanation

                              The headquarters of Meezan Bank is located in Karachi


                              The bank's registered head office, known as Meezan House


                              Meezan Bank was formerly known as Al Meezan Investment Bank.


                              Renamed: Meezan Bank Limited (2002)


                              Significance: It was the first Islamic commercial bank in Pakistan.


                              Founded: 27 January 1997 


                              Headquarters: Karachi


                              In 2000: listed on the Karachi Stock Exchange.

                              Meezan Bank was founded in which year?

                              Correct Answer: 2005
                              Show explanation

                              Meezan Bank was incorporated on January 27, 1997


                              Meezan Bank was formerly known as Al Meezan Investment Bank.


                              Renamed: Meezan Bank Limited (2002)


                              Significance: It was the first Islamic commercial bank in Pakistan.


                              Headquarters: Karachi


                              The Bank was granted a'Scheduled Islamic Commercial Bank' license on January 31, 2002

                              Meezan Bank was formerly known as Al Meezan Investment Bank.


                              Renamed: Meezan Bank Limited (2002)


                              Significance: It was the first Islamic commercial bank in Pakistan.

                              142

                              Agricultural loan recovery mainly depends on?

                              Correct Answer: Return capacity of loan
                              Show explanation
                              Explanation

                              The recovery of an agricultural loan depends primarily on the repayment capacity (or return capacity) of the borrower. 


                              Repayment of Ag loans depends primarily on the successful planting and harvest of crops (or the raising and feeding of livestock)


                              Marketing the harvested commodity (including grain, milk, hay, cattle, swine, and poultry). 

                              143

                              Who appoints the Banking Mohtasib in Pakistan?

                              Correct Answer: Federal Government
                              Show explanation
                              Explanation

                              Federal Government (specifically, the President of Pakistan acting for the Federal Government)


                              This appointment is made in consultation with the Governor of the State Bank of Pakistan. 


                              Term of Office:  four years.

                              144

                              The Red Sindhi and Nili Ravi are breeds of which livestock in Pakistan?

                              Correct Answer: Cattle (Cow and Buffalo)
                              Show explanation
                              Explanation
                              • Red Sindhi: Indigenous cow breed, reddish color, high milk yield, heat tolerant
                              • Nili Ravi: Famous water buffalo breed, large body, high-fat milk production
                              • Main Purpose: Dairy production for local and commercial use
                              • Major Regions: Punjab, Sindh (Pakistan)
                              • Adaptability: Well-suited to tropical and subtropical climates

                              Last verified on 05-02-2025

                              145

                              Money circulation in Pakistan is controlled by?

                              Correct Answer: State Bank of Pakistan
                              Show explanation
                              Explanation

                              Money circulation in Pakistan is controlled by the State Bank of Pakistan (SBP)


                              The State Bank of Pakistan (SBP) is the central bank of the country.


                              It controls money supply, inflation, and circulation in the economy.

                              146

                              Loans are granted to farmers on what basis?

                              Correct Answer: Repayment Capacity
                              Show explanation
                              Explanation

                              Agricultural loans are mainly granted based on the farmer’s repayment capacity, i.e., their ability to repay the loan from crop income.


                              Collateral, crop type, and farm size may be considered, but the primary criterion is repayment capacity as per State Bank of Pakistan guidelines.

                              147

                              Which one is the Kharif Crop among the following?

                              Correct Answer: Cotton
                              Show explanation
                              Explanation
                              Major Kharif Crops
                              1. Rice
                              2. Sugarcane
                              3. Cotton
                              4. Maize
                              5. Bajra
                              6. Jowar
                              Additional information:
                              Kharif Crop Period
                              • Start: April – June
                              • End: September – October
                              Rabi Crop Period
                              • Sowing: October – December
                              • Harvesting: March – May

                              Last verified on 25-01-2026

                              148

                              The economy of Pakistan is based on ______?

                              Correct Answer: Agriculture
                              Show explanation
                              Explanation
                              • Agriculture contributes a major share to GDP (around one-fifth).
                                • Provides raw material to textile and sugar industries.
                                • Employs a large portion of the rural population.
                                • Major crops: Wheat, Cotton, Rice, Sugarcane, Maize.
                                • Irrigation mainly comes from the Indus River system.

                                Last verified on 05-02-2026

                                149

                                Who is the Current Governor of the State Bank of Pakistan (SBP)?

                                Correct Answer: Jameel Ahmed
                                Show explanation
                                Explanation
                                • Name: Jameel Ahmad
                                • Term: 5 years, 19 August 2022
                                • Previously, Murtaza Syed 


                                ======

                                History of State Bank

                                  • The President of Pakistan appoints the Governor.
                                  • Term of five years.
                                  • Zahid Husain was the founder and the first governor of the State Bank of Pakistan from June 1948 to July 1953.
                                  • Dr. Shamshad Akhtar became the first female Governor of State Bank of Pakistan in 2006.

                                  Last updated by NS on 06 May 2026


                                     



                                  150

                                  Kashmir Solidarity Day is celebrated in Pakistan on which date?

                                  Correct Answer: February 5
                                  Show explanation
                                  Explanation

                                  Kashmir Solidarity Day or Kashmir Day is a national holiday observed in Pakistan 

                                  Date: February 5

                                  Kashmir Day Event Length: 1 Day

                                  Kashmir Day Related to the Kashmir Conflict

                                  Kashmir Day was Started by: Jamaat-e-Islami Pakistan in 1990

                                  Kashmir Day was first proposed by Qazi Hussain Ahmad 

                                  In 1991, the then-Prime Minister of Pakistan Nawaz Sharif called for a "Kashmir Solidarity Day Strike"


                                  151

                                  When Transgender Persons (Protection of Rights) Act passed in Pakistan?

                                  Correct Answer: 2018
                                  Show explanation
                                  Explanation
                                  • Passed in: May 2018 by the National Assembly of Pakistan

                                    Purpose:

                                    • Allows transgender persons to self-identify their gender on official documents
                                    • Prohibits discrimination in jobs, education, healthcare
                                    • Grants rights to inheritance and social welfare

                                    Last verified on 04-02-2026

                                    152

                                    In which province of Pakistan Lal Sohanra National Park and Chinji National park, are located?

                                    Correct Answer: Punjab
                                    Show explanation
                                    Explanation
                                  • Lal Suhanra National Park:
                                    • Location: Punjab
                                    • Established: 1972
                                    • Area: 51,368 hectares
                                  • Chinji National Park:
                                    • Location: Punjab
                                    • Established: 1987
                                    • Area: 6,097 hectares
                                  • Last verified on 04-02-2026
                                    • 153

                                    Amendment in the constitution is done with _______ in both houses.

                                    Correct Answer: Two-third majority
                                    Show explanation
                                    Explanation
                                    • In Pakistan, constitutional amendments require a two-thirds majority in both National Assembly and Senate.
                                    • Governed by Articles 238 and 239 of the 1973 Constitution.
                                    • Ensures broad consensus before changing fundamental laws.

                                    Last verified on 04-02-2026

                                    154

                                    Leaders of Hyderabad were called ____?

                                    Correct Answer: Nazim
                                    Show explanation
                                    Explanation
                                    • Leaders of Hyderabad were historically called Nazims.

                                    Additional information:

                                    • They administered the state under the Nizam monarchy.
                                    • The Nizams were rulers from 18th to 20th century.
                                    • Hyderabad State included regions now in Telangana, Karnataka, and Maharashtra.
                                    • Nazims were responsible for local governance and law enforcement.

                                    Last verified on 04-02-2026

                                    155

                                    Forests are only _____ of the total area of Pakistan.

                                    Correct Answer: 4.8%
                                    Show explanation
                                    Explanation

                                    • The total area of Pakistan is 881,913 km.²
                                    • Forest has about 4.8% (5%) of the total land area.
                                    • In Pakistan's hilly areas, about 40% forest comprises coniferous and scrub forests.
                                    • The largest forest in Pakistan is Changa Manga.

                                    Last verified on 03-02-2026

                                    156

                                    Pakistan's Arshad Nadeem won gold medal in Olympics 2024 in Javelin Throw by achieving throw of how much meters?

                                    Correct Answer: 92.97 meters
                                    Show explanation
                                    Explanation

                                    Arshad Nadeem

                                    • Winning Throw: 92.97 m
                                    • Medal: Gold
                                    • Date: 8 August 2024
                                    • Origin: Mian Channu, Pakistan
                                    • Previous Olympic Record: 90.57 m by Andreas Thorkildsen (Beijing 2008)
                                    • Global Ranking: Sixth longest throw ever; best in the world in 2024

                                    • Winning Throw: 92.97 m

                                    • Global Ranking: Sixth longest throw ever; best in the world in 2024

                                    Veteran actor Moeen Akhtar was famous for which type of acting ?

                                    • Moin Akhter was a legendary Pakistani comedian, actor, and host known for his work on television, film, and stage.

                                    • Died: 22 April 2011, Karachi (age 60)
                                    • Career Start: As child actor at age 13

                                    Pakistan Super League 2022

                                    Edition: Seventh (7th)

                                    Dates: 27 Jan – 27 Feb 2022

                                    Administrator: PCB

                                    Format: T20

                                    Venue: Pakistan

                                    Champions: Lahore Qalandars (1st title)

                                    Lahore Qalandars won by: 42 runs

                                    Runner-up: Multan Sultans

                                    Matches: 34

                                    161

                                    Before 1901, the North-West Frontier Province (NWFP) was ______?

                                    Correct Answer: Part of Punjab
                                    Show explanation
                                    Explanation
                                    • Before 1901: Part of Punjab
                                    • Created as separate province: 9 November 1901
                                    • Reason: Administrative control of tribal areas
                                    • Capital (After 1901): Peshawar
                                    • Border: Shared with Afghanistan

                                    Additional information:

                                    • NWFP was later renamed Khyber Pakhtunkhwa in 2010.

                                    Last verified on 02-02-2026

                                    162

                                    Arshad Nadeem won a gold medal for Pakistan javelin throw in _____?

                                    Correct Answer: All of these
                                    Show explanation
                                    Explanation
                                    • First javelin gold for Pakistan was won by Arshad Nadeem in Common Wealth Games in Birmingham, England in August 2022.

                                    • He won a gold medal for his record-breaking 90.18-metre throw.

                                    • He became first South Asian and second Asian to win this title.

                                    Key Achievements:

                                    • 2024 Paris Olympics: Gold medal ((92.97)m record throw).
                                    • 2022 Commonwealth Games: Gold medal.
                                    • 2022 Islamic Solidarity Games: Gold medal.

                                        164

                                        After the death of Zia ul Haq on 7th August 1988, who was made the President of Pakistan?

                                        Correct Answer: Ghulam Ishaq Khan
                                        Show explanation
                                        Explanation
                                        • After the death of President Zia-ul-Haq in an air crash in August 1988, Ghulam Ishaq Khan became the President of Pakistan.

                                          Additional information:

                                          • Ghulam Ishaq Khan Became President: August 1988
                                          • Presidential Term: 1988–1993
                                          • Order: 7th President of Pakistan
                                          • Chairman Senate: 1985–1988
                                          • Party Winning 1988 Elections: PPP

                                          Zia-ul-Haq:

                                          • Order: 6th President of Pakistan
                                          • Presidential Term: 16 Sept 1978 – Aug 1988
                                          • Death: Aircraft crash, 17 August 1988, Bahawalpur

                                          Last verified on 02-02-2026

                                          165

                                          بابائے اردو کس شخصیت کو کہا جاتا ہے؟

                                          Correct Answer: مولوی عبدالحق
                                          Show explanation
                                          Explanation

                                          مولوی عبدالحق کو اردو زبان کی ترویج اور معیاری شکل دینے کی وجہ سے بابائے اردو کہا جاتا ہے۔

                                           وہ انجمن ترقیِ اردو کے اہم رہنما تھے اور اردو لغت و تحقیق پر بڑا کام کیا۔


                                          Last verified on 02-02-2026

                                          166

                                          The energy crisis in Pakistan is mainly due to ______?

                                          Correct Answer: Circular debt and mismanagement
                                          Show explanation
                                          Explanation
                                          • Main Cause: Circular debt & mismanagement
                                          • Other Factors: Inefficient power plants, transmission losses, delayed payments
                                          • Impact: Frequent load shedding, industrial slowdown
                                          • Energy Gap: Pakistan’s demand often exceeds supply by 4,000–5,000 MW
                                          • Affected Areas: Nationwide, including rural and urban regions

                                          Last verified on 02-02-2026

                                          167

                                          The 1962 Constitution of Pakistan was passed during the regime of?

                                          Correct Answer: Ayub Khan
                                          Show explanation
                                          Explanation
                                          • 2nd Constitution (1962): 250 articles, 10 parts, imposed by Ayub Khan during his first martial law.
                                          Additional information:
                                          • 1st Constitution (1956): 234 articles, 13 parts, adopted during civilian rule.
                                          • 3rd Constitution (1973): 280 articles, 12 parts, introduced in Zulfikar Ali Bhutto’s era.
                                          • First Martial Law: Imposed by Ayub Khan before the 1962 Constitution.
                                          Last verified on 02-02-2026
                                          168

                                          Who was the founder of the Khilji Dynasty?

                                          Correct Answer: Jalaluddin Khilji
                                          Show explanation
                                          Explanation
                                          • After the fall of the Slave (Mamluk) Dynasty, Delhi Sultanate became weak due to revolts.
                                          • The Khilji Dynasty replaced the Slave Dynasty.
                                          • Its founder was Jalal ud din Firuz Khilji.

                                          Additional information:

                                          • He became Sultan in 1290 at about 70 years of age.
                                          • He was later killed by his nephew Alauddin Khilji (Ali Gurshap).

                                          Last verified on 02-02-2026

                                          169

                                          Who scored highest Innings score in ODI for Pakistan?

                                          Correct Answer: Fakhar Zaman
                                          Show explanation
                                          Explanation
                                          • In ODI cricket, the highest individual score for Pakistan is 210 not out by Fakhar Zaman.
                                          • This record was set against Zimbabwe in 2018.

                                          Additional information:

                                          • Babar Azam: 122 in T20I (highest for Pakistan in T20)
                                          • Hanif Mohammad: 337 in Test cricket (highest Test score for Pakistan)

                                          Last verified on 01-02-2026

                                          170

                                          Sirinagar and Muzaffarabad bus service was started in ______?

                                          Correct Answer: 2005
                                          Show explanation
                                          Explanation
                                          • Srinagar–Muzaffarabad bus service was started to improve people-to-people contact between Indian-administered and Pakistan-administered Kashmir.
                                          • The service was inaugurated in 2005 under a confidence-building initiative.
                                          • It helped families separated by the Line of Control (LoC) meet and strengthened cross-border communication.

                                          Last verified on 01-02-2026

                                          171

                                          Razia Sultana was the daughter of?

                                          Correct Answer: Shams ud-Din Iltutmis
                                          Show explanation
                                          Explanation
                                          • Razia Sultana was the first female ruler of Delhi Sultanate.
                                            • She ruled India from 1236 to 1240.
                                            • She was the daughter of Sultan Shams-ud-Din Iltutmish and Turkan Khatun.
                                            • Known for her bravery, intelligence, and administrative skills.

                                            Last verified on 01-02-2026

                                            172

                                            The book "Zinda Rood" is written by _____?

                                            Correct Answer: Dr. Javed Iqbal
                                            Show explanation
                                            Explanation
                                            • Book: Zinda Rood (زندہ رود)
                                            • Subject: Biography of Allama Muhammad Iqbal
                                            • Author: Dr. Javed Iqbal (son of Allama Iqbal)
                                            • Volumes & Years: 3 volumes, published 1979–1984
                                            • Importance: Most authentic and detailed account of Iqbal’s life, personal aspects, and philosophy

                                            Last verified on 01-02-2026

                                            173

                                            The first general elections in Pakistan were held on?

                                            Correct Answer: Dec 7, 1970
                                            Show explanation
                                            Explanation
                                            • The first general elections in Pakistan were held on 7 December 1970.
                                            • Conducted under the Legal Framework Order (LFO) issued by General Yahya Khan.

                                              Seats Structure:

                                              Total seats: 313 seats in National Assembly
                                              General seats: 300 seats

                                              • East Pakistan: 162 seats
                                              • West Pakistan: 138 seats

                                              Reserved seats for women: 13 seats

                                              • East Pakistan: 7 seats
                                              • West Pakistan: 6 seats

                                              Main Results:

                                              Sheikh Mujibur Rahman (Awami League)

                                              • Seats won: 167
                                              • Votes: 12,937,162
                                              • Percentage: 39.20%

                                              Zulfikar Ali Bhutto (PPP)

                                              • Seats won: 86
                                              • Votes: 6,148,923
                                              • Percentage: 18.63%

                                              Last verified on 21-06-2026

                                              174

                                              SECP is the regulatory authority of -------

                                              Correct Answer: Stock market
                                              Show explanation
                                              Explanation

                                              The SECP is the regulatory authority of the Pakistan stock market


                                              SECP  stands for Securities and Exchange Commission of Pakistan


                                              Functions: It supervises securities markets, non-banking financial companies (NBFCs), insurance companies, and private pension funds.


                                              Objective: To protect investors and foster economic growth. 

                                               

                                              175

                                              Haran Minar was built by _____?

                                              Correct Answer: Jahangir
                                              Show explanation
                                              Explanation

                                              Haran Minar (Deer Tower) was built by the Mughal Emperor Jahangir in 1606.


                                              Hiran Minar is located in Sheikhupura, Punjab.


                                              This monument was constructed in memory of his beloved pet antelope named Mansraj (or Mansiraj)


                                              176

                                              Rakaposhi is located in which mountain range?

                                              Correct Answer: Karakoram
                                              Show explanation
                                              Explanation

                                              Rakaposhi is located in the Gilgit-Baltistan region of Pakistan.


                                              It is the 27th-highest mountain in the world.

                                              It is the steepest peak in the world.

                                              Rakaposhi rises over the Nagar Valley.

                                              It is the part of the Karakoram range.

                                              It is the 12th highest mountain in Pakistan.

                                              The first successful ascent was in 1958 by Mike Banks and Tom Patey.

                                              Rakaposhi is also known as Dumani, meaning "Mother of Mist" or "Mother of Clouds."

                                              177

                                              Which day is observed as Black Day in Kashmir_____?

                                              Correct Answer: October 27
                                              Show explanation
                                              Explanation

                                              Kashmir Black Day is observed annually on 27 October.


                                              It commemorates 27 October 1947, when Indian forces entered Kashmir.


                                              The day has increased significance following the 5 August 2019, revocation of Article 370 by India. 


                                              178

                                              Objective resolution was made substantive part of constitution on:

                                              Correct Answer: March 2 ,1985
                                              Show explanation
                                              Explanation

                                              The Objectives Resolutionwas made a substantive part of the Constitution of Pakistan on March 2, 1985.


                                              Passed by Constituent Assembly: March 12, 1949.


                                               It was incorporated into the 1973 Constitution as Article 2A through the Revival of Constitution of 1973 Order (President's Order No. 14 of 1985). 

                                              179

                                              The cleanest beach near Hub, Balochistan is?

                                              Correct Answer: Gadani Beach
                                              Show explanation
                                              Explanation

                                              Gadani Beach is located near Hub, Balochistan.


                                              It is known for being clean and less crowded


                                              known for its golden sands and clear water. 


                                              Part of Sonmiani Bay

                                              184

                                              India did airstrikes in 2019. When India has struck it before?

                                              Correct Answer: 1971
                                              Show explanation
                                              Explanation

                                              The 2019 Balakot airstrike was a bombing raid conducted by Indian


                                              On 26 February 2019 in Balakot, Pakistan


                                              Against an alleged training camp of the terrorist group Jaish-e-Mohammed


                                              India had previously conducted airstrikes on Pakistan in 1971 during the Indo-Pakistani War of 1971.

                                              185

                                              Indian forces occupied Kashmir in the year ______?

                                              Correct Answer: 1947
                                              Show explanation
                                              Explanation

                                            •  After the ruler of the princely state, Maharaja Hari Singh
