                                                                                                  Which is the most widely used irrigation method in Pakistan______?

                                                                                                  Correct Answer: Perennial Canals
                                                                                                  Show explanation
                                                                                                  Explanation

                                                                                                  Perennial Canals flow throughout the year

                                                                                                  Thus referred to as perennial canals.

                                                                                                  They draw water from perennial rivers or from artificial reservoirs

                                                                                                  which sustain a high water level on the upstream side.

                                                                                                  450

                                                                                                  Which is the main source of agriculture credit ?

                                                                                                  Correct Answer: Zarai Taraqiati Bank
                                                                                                  Show explanation
                                                                                                  Explanation

                                                                                                  Headquarters of Zarai Taraqiati Bank Limited located in Islamabad. 

                                                                                                  Modern agriculture technology machinery and Agriculture loans in Pakistan.

                                                                                                  451

                                                                                                  Which of the following is a Rabi Crop?

                                                                                                  Correct Answer: Mustard
                                                                                                  Show explanation
                                                                                                  Explanation

                                                                                                  Mustard is a Rabi crop.

                                                                                                  Rabi crop is grown in autumn or early winter

                                                                                                  They harvested in spring or early summer

                                                                                                  They are grown in October or November. 

                                                                                                  major rabi crop in India and Pakistan is:

                                                                                                  • wheat, 
                                                                                                  • barley,
                                                                                                  • mustard,
                                                                                                  • sesame,
                                                                                                  •  peas.

                                                                                                  Rabi crops are known as winter crops.

                                                                                                  ND23-4-2023

                                                                                                  452

                                                                                                  Agriculture extension relates to

                                                                                                  Correct Answer: Educating formers
                                                                                                  Show explanation
                                                                                                  Explanation

                                                                                                  Agricultural extension plays a crucial role in boosting agricultural productivity, increasing food security, improving rural livelihoods, and promoting agriculture as an engine of pro-poor economic growth.


                                                                                                  453

                                                                                                  Mostly rice is cultivated in ?

                                                                                                  Correct Answer: Punjab
                                                                                                  Show explanation
                                                                                                  Explanation

                                                                                                  Punjab is the largest rice-producing province and the “Kalar” tract -the bowl of the world famous Basmati rice is located between the Ravi and Chenab rivers.

                                                                                                  454

                                                                                                  Banana fruit is classifies in the which category?

                                                                                                  Correct Answer: Berry
                                                                                                  Show explanation
                                                                                                  Explanation
                                                                                                  • Banana is classified as a berry in botanical terms.
                                                                                                    • It develops from a single ovary.
                                                                                                    • Soft, fleshy, and contains multiple seeds (small or undeveloped in cultivated varieties).
                                                                                                    • Edible and rich in carbohydrates and vitamins.
                                                                                                    • Commonly grown in tropical and subtropical regions.

                                                                                                    Last verified on 06-02-2026

                                                                                                    Which type of credit is advanced in agriculture sector ?

                                                                                                    Correct Answer: Sami agricultural credit
                                                                                                    Show explanation
                                                                                                    Explanation

                                                                                                     Pakistan main sources of agriculture credit were relatives and friends, landlords, shopkeeper's commission agents.

                                                                                                    Super basmati is a verity of

                                                                                                    Correct Answer: Rice
                                                                                                    Show explanation
                                                                                                    Explanation

                                                                                                    3 main different types of rice are:

                                                                                                    The three main different types of rice: short grain, medium grain, long grain


                                                                                                    457

                                                                                                    Agriculture occupies a significance position in the starting of economic development in Pakistan and policy measures must be devised to improve and achieve higher rate of growth because

                                                                                                    Correct Answer: Both
                                                                                                    Show explanation
                                                                                                    Explanation

                                                                                                    Agriculture is the art and science of cultivating the soil, growing crops and raising livestock.

                                                                                                    458

                                                                                                    The Indus Basin irrigation system, one of the largest in the world primarily serves agriculture in which region of Pakistan?

                                                                                                    Correct Answer: Southern Punjab
                                                                                                    Show explanation
                                                                                                    Explanation

                                                                                                    The Indus basin system is composed of more than 63,213 kms of channels

                                                                                                    The Sukkur Barrage, is the pride of Pakistan's irrigation system

                                                                                                    It is the largest single irrigation network of its kind in the world.

                                                                                                    459

                                                                                                    In Pakistan cultivation of Basmati rice is particularly associated in which region

                                                                                                    Correct Answer: Gujranwala
                                                                                                    Show explanation
                                                                                                    Explanation

                                                                                                    Pakistan is the world's 10th largest producer of rice.

                                                                                                    Pakistan's exports more than 8% of the world's total rice trade.

                                                                                                    ice is an important Kharif crop.

                                                                                                    Rice is grown in fertile lands of Punjab, Sindh and Balochistan 

                                                                                                    460

                                                                                                    Which financial ratio indicates the proportion of revenue that exceeds the COGS?

                                                                                                    Correct Answer: Grass profit margin
                                                                                                    Show explanation
                                                                                                    Explanation

                                                                                                    The financial ratio that indicates the proportion of revenue is the gross profit margin.

                                                                                                    The gross profit margin is calculated by:

                                                                                                      • subtracting the COGS from the revenue
                                                                                                      • and then dividing the result by the revenue.

                                                                                                      This ratio represents the percentage of revenue that remains as:
                                                                                                      gross profit after accounting for the cost of producing the goods or services.



                                                                                                      461

                                                                                                      Pakistan won ACC Under-19 Asia Cup 2025 by defeating which country's team in the final?

                                                                                                      Correct Answer: India
                                                                                                      Show explanation
                                                                                                      Explanation

                                                                                                      About ACC Under-19 Asia Cup 2025

                                                                                                      Edition: 12th

                                                                                                      Dates: 12 to 21 December 2025

                                                                                                      Venue: Dubai, United Arab Emirates (UAE)

                                                                                                      Champions: Pakistan (2nd title)

                                                                                                      Runners-up: India

                                                                                                      Participants: 8 teams

                                                                                                      Matches: 15

                                                                                                      Player of the series: Sameer Minhas (Pak)

                                                                                                      Most runs: Pakistani Sameer Minhas (471)

                                                                                                       

                                                                                                      Additional Information:

                                                                                                      Bangladesh won the last edition after defeating India by 59 runs in the final of the 2024 edition.

                                                                                                       ****

                                                                                                      462

                                                                                                      Which medal awarded to Field Marshal Asim Munir in 2025 for his efforts to advance Pak-Saudi ties?

                                                                                                      Correct Answer: King Abdulaziz Medal of Excellent Class
                                                                                                      Show explanation
                                                                                                      Explanation

                                                                                                      On 22 December 2025, Saudi Arabia’s Defence Minister Prince Khalid bin Salman bin Abdulaziz conferred the King Abdulaziz Medal of Excellent Class on Chief of Defence Forces (CDF) and Chief of Army Staff Field Marshal Asim Munir for his efforts to “advance Pak-Saudi ties”.

                                                                                                      Munir was awarded during his visit to Saudi Arabia.

                                                                                                      This medal is usually awarded to those who have rendered outstanding services to Saudi Arabia or one of its institutions.

                                                                                                      ****

                                                                                                      463

                                                                                                      Pakistan’s economy depends on?

                                                                                                      Correct Answer: Agriculture
                                                                                                      Show explanation
                                                                                                      Explanation

                                                                                                      Agriculture is the backbone of Pakistan’s economy.

                                                                                                      It contributes significantly to GDP, provides employment to a large part of the population, and supports industries like textiles and food processing.

                                                                                                      Key crops include wheat, rice, cotton, and sugarcane.

                                                                                                      Left office

                                                                                                      Muhammad Ali Jinnah

                                                                                                      (1876–1948)

                                                                                                      15-Aug-47

                                                                                                      11-Sep-48

                                                                                                      Pakistan Muslim League

                                                                                                      (1894–1964)

                                                                                                      (1895–1956)

                                                                                                      465

                                                                                                      How many rivers in Punjab?

                                                                                                      Correct Answer: 5

                                                                                                      Explanation

                                                                                                      There are a total of five Rivers in Punjab

                                                                                                      Punjab is known as the land of five rivers. 

                                                                                                      Sr#River NameProvinceLength Final

                                                                                                      2Chenab RiverPunjab960 km
                                                                                                      3Jhelum RiverPunjab725 km
                                                                                                      4Ravi RiverPunjab720 km
                                                                                                      5Beas RiverPunjab

                                                                                                      466

                                                                                                      Which of the following mountain peaks is called Killer Mountain?

                                                                                                      Correct Answer: Nanga Parbat
                                                                                                      Show explanation
                                                                                                      Explanation

                                                                                                      Nanga Parbat, locally known as Diamer, is the ninth highest mountain in the world at 8,126 metres above sea level.

                                                                                                      Located in the Diamer District of Gilgit-Baltistan region

                                                                                                      Rk.MountainHeight(M)Height(F)RangeParent mountainFirst ascentCountry
                                                                                                      1Mount Everest 8,84829,029Mahalangur Himalayanone1953Nepal
                                                                                                      2K28,61128,251Baltoro KarakoramMount Everest1954Pakistan, China

                                                                                                      4Lhotse8,51627,940Mahalangur HimalayaMount Everest1956Nepal, China
                                                                                                      5Makalu8,48527,838Mahalangur HimalayaMount Everest1955Nepal, China
                                                                                                      6Cho Oyu8,18826,864Mahalangur HimalayaMount Everest1954Nepal, China
                                                                                                      7Dhaulagiri I8,16726,795Dhaulagiri HimalayaK21960Nepal

                                                                                                      467

                                                                                                      What is the area of KPK?

                                                                                                      Correct Answer: 101,741 sq.km,
                                                                                                      Show explanation
                                                                                                      Explanation

                                                                                                      KPK Established in 1 July 1970

                                                                                                      KPK Renamed in 19 April 2010

                                                                                                      FATA Merged in 31 May 2018

                                                                                                      KPK Capital and largest city is Peshawar

                                                                                                      Total Area 101,741 sq.km,

                                                                                                      Located in the northwestern region

                                                                                                      KPK has 36 districts and 8th divisions.

                                                                                                      Khyber Pakhtunkhwa is the fourth-largest province of Pakistan by land area

                                                                                                      and the third-largest province by population. 

                                                                                                      *********

                                                                                                      The total area of Pakistan is 881,913 km² 

                                                                                                      while

                                                                                                      140,914 sq Km, is the total area of Sindh Province

                                                                                                      13,297 km² is the total area of Azad Kashmir

                                                                                                      347,190 sq Km is the total area of the Balochistan Province

                                                                                                      74,521 Sq Km, is the total area of Khyber Khyber Pakhtunkhwa (KPK)

                                                                                                      205,344 sq Km, is the total area of the Punjab Province.

                                                                                                      SH6-9-2023


                                                                                                      468

                                                                                                      The Ravi River falls in which river ?

                                                                                                      Correct Answer: Chenab
                                                                                                      Show explanation
                                                                                                      Explanation

                                                                                                      The Ravi River, one of Punjab's five legendary rivers

                                                                                                      Originates in India's Himalayas,

                                                                                                      Flows along the India-Pakistan border, passes by Lahore,

                                                                                                      And then empties into the Chenab River

                                                                                                      Confluence: Joins the Chenab River south of Ahmadpur Sial, Pakistan.

                                                                                                      Tributary of: The Indus River. 

                                                                                                      469

                                                                                                      What is the border between Pakistan and Afghanistan called_______?

                                                                                                      Correct Answer: Durand Line
                                                                                                      Show explanation
                                                                                                      Explanation

                                                                                                      The length of the common border between Pakistan and Afghanistan is 2611 km

                                                                                                      ...

                                                                                                      The common border between Pakistan and Afghanistan called Durand Line

                                                                                                      ..

                                                                                                      Durand line is drawn in 1893 between Mortimer Durand and Abdul Rahman

                                                                                                      Durand line agreement between Mortimer Durand and Abdul Rahman.

                                                                                                      ********

                                                                                                      According to the Survey of Pakistan, the border between Pakistan and Afghanistan is 2611 km
